do.title: Do
do.description: Defines the task(s) the workflow must perform.

dsl.title: WorkflowDSL
dsl.description: The version of the DSL used by the workflow.

metadata.title: WorkflowMetadata
metadata.description: Holds additional information about the workflow.

tags.title: WorkflowTags
tags.description: A key/value mapping of the workflow's tags, if any.

taskQueue.title: WorkflowTaskQueue
taskQueue.description: The Temporal task queue the workflow runs on.

cron.title: ScheduleCron
cron.description: Specifies the schedule using a cron expression, e.g., '0 0 * * *' for daily at midnight.

every.title: ScheduleEvery
every.description: Specifies the duration of the interval at which the workflow should be executed.

oneOf.title: TimeoutDefinition
oneOf.description: The workflow's timeout configuration, if any.

oneOf.title: CallActivity
oneOf.description: Defines the external Temporal activity call to perform.

name.title: WithActivityName
name.description: The name of the activity to call on the defined Activity service.

taskQueue.title: WithActivityTaskQueue
taskQueue.description: The name of the task queue to call on the defined Activity service.

oneOf.title: CallGRPC
oneOf.description: Defines the GRPC call to perform.

arguments.title: WithGRPCArguments
arguments.description: The arguments, if any, to call the method with.

method.title: WithGRPCMethod
method.description: The name of the method to call on the defined GRPC service.

proto.title: WithGRPCProto
proto.description: The proto resource that describes the GRPC service to call.

host.title: WithGRPCServiceHost
host.description: The hostname of the GRPC service to call.

name.title: WithGRPCServiceName
name.description: The name of the GRPC service to call.

port.title: WithGRPCServicePort
port.description: The port number of the GRPC service to call.

oneOf.title: CallHTTP
oneOf.description: Defines the HTTP call to perform.

body.title: HTTPBody
body.description: The body, if any, of the HTTP request to perform.

endpoint.title: HTTPEndpoint
endpoint.description: The HTTP endpoint to send the request to.

headers.title: HTTPHeaders
headers.description: A name/value mapping of the headers, if any, of the HTTP request to perform.

method.title: HTTPMethod
method.description: The HTTP method of the HTTP request to perform.

output.title: HTTPOutput
output.description: The http call output format. Defaults to 'content'.

query.title: HTTPQuery
query.description: A name/value mapping of the query parameters, if any, of the HTTP request to perform.

redirect.title: HttpRedirect
redirect.description: Specifies whether redirection status codes (`300-399`) should be treated as errors.

disableEagerExecution.description: If true, eager execution will not be requested, regardless of worker settings. If false, eager execution may still be disabled at the worker level or may not be requested due to lack of available slots.

heartbeatTimeout.title: HeartbeatTimeout
heartbeatTimeout.description: Heartbeat interval. A heartbeat must be set and be called before the interval passes.

fairnessKey.title: FairnessKey
fairnessKey.description: A short string that's used as a key for a fairness balancing mechanism

fairnessWeight.title: FairnessWeight
fairnessWeight.description: Weight of a task can come from multiple sources for flexibility

priorityKey.title: PriorityKey
priorityKey.description: A positive integer from 1 to n, where smaller integers correspond to higher priorities (tasks run sooner)

priority.title: Priority
priority.description: Configure an activity's priority and fairness

backoffCoefficient.title: BackoffCoefficient
backoffCoefficient.description: Coefficient used to calculate the next retry backoff interval.

initialInterval.title: InitialInterval
initialInterval.description: Backoff interval for the first retry. If BackoffCoefficient is 1.0 then it is used for all retries.

maximumAttempts.title: MaximumAttempts
maximumAttempts.description: Maximum number of attempts. When exceeded the retries stop even if not expired yet.

nonRetryableErrorTypes.title: NonRetryableErrorTypes
nonRetryableErrorTypes.description: Temporal server will stop retry if error type matches this list.

retryPolicy.title: RetryPolicy
retryPolicy.description: Specifies how to retry an Activity if an error occurs

scheduleToCloseTimeout.title: ScheduleToCloseTimeout
scheduleToCloseTimeout.description: Total time that a workflow is willing to wait for an Activity to complete.

scheduleToStartTimeout.title: ScheduleToStartTimeout
scheduleToStartTimeout.description: Time that the Activity Task can stay in the Task Queue before it is picked up by a Worker. Do not specify this timeout unless using host specific Task Queues for Activity Tasks are being used for routing.

startToCloseTimeout.title: StartToCloseTimeout
startToCloseTimeout.description: Maximum time of a single Activity execution attempt.

summary.description: Add a summary to the Temporal workflow UI.

cleanup.title: ContainerCleanupPolicy
cleanup.description: The container cleanup policy to use

containerLifetime.title: ContainerLifetime
containerLifetime.description: The configuration of a container's lifetime

doTask.title: DoTask
doTask.description: Allows to execute a list of tasks in sequence.

do.title: DoTaskConfiguration
do.description: The configuration of the tasks to perform sequentially.

canMaxHistoryLength.title: ContinueAsNewMaxHistoryLength
canMaxHistoryLength.description: Allows you to test the Continue-As-New functionality by specifying the max history length before triggering.

scheduleId.title: ScheduleID
scheduleId.description: Set the schedule ID. If not set, this will to zigflow_<workflow.document.workflowType>

scheduleWorkflowName.title: ScheduleWorkflowName
scheduleWorkflowName.description: Set the workflow name to trigger - this will either be the document.workflowType or the Do task

oneOf.title: LiteralEndpointURI
oneOf.description: The literal endpoint's URI.

oneOf.title: ExpressionEndpointURI
oneOf.description: An expression based endpoint's URI.

detail.title: ErrorDetails
detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the error.

instance.title: ErrorInstance
instance.description: A JSON Pointer used to reference the component the error originates from.

oneOf.title: LiteralErrorInstance
oneOf.description: The literal error instance.

oneOf.title: ExpressionErrorInstance
oneOf.description: An expression based error instance.

status.title: ErrorStatus
status.description: The status code generated by the origin for this occurrence of the error.

title.title: ErrorTitle
title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the error.

type.title: ErrorType
type.description: A URI reference that identifies the error type.

oneOf.title: LiteralErrorType
oneOf.description: The literal error type.

oneOf.title: ExpressionErrorType
oneOf.description: An expression based error type.

eventConsumptionStrategy.title: EventConsumptionStrategy
eventConsumptionStrategy.description: Describe the event consumption strategy to adopt.

all.title: AllEventConsumptionStrategyConfiguration
all.description: A list containing all the events that must be consumed.

any.title: AnyEventConsumptionStrategyConfiguration
any.description: A list containing any of the events to consume.

with.title: WithEvent
with.description: An event filter is a mechanism used to selectively process or handle events based on predefined criteria, such as event type, source, or specific attributes.

eventFilter.title: EventFilter
eventFilter.description: An event filter is a mechanism used to selectively process or handle events based on predefined criteria, such as event type, source, or specific attributes.

datacontenttype.title: EventDataContentType
datacontenttype.description: Content type of data value. This attribute enables data to carry any type of content, whereby format and encoding might differ from that of the chosen event format.

dataschema.title: EventDataschema
dataschema.description: The schema describing the event format.

oneOf.title: LiteralDataSchema
oneOf.description: The literal event data schema.

oneOf.title: ExpressionDataSchema
oneOf.description: An expression based event data schema.

source.title: EventSource
source.description: Identifies the context in which an event happened.

type.title: EventType
type.description: This attribute contains a value describing the type of event related to the originating occurrence.

eventProperties.title: EventProperties
eventProperties.description: Describes the properties of an event.

as.title: ExportAs
as.description: A runtime expression, if any, used to export the output data to the context.

schema.title: ExportSchema
schema.description: The schema used to describe and validate the workflow context.

export.title: Export
export.description: Set the content of the context.

endpoint.title: ExternalResourceEndpoint
endpoint.description: The endpoint of the external resource.

name.title: ExternalResourceName
name.description: The name of the external resource, if any.

flowDirective.title: FlowDirective
flowDirective.description: Represents different transition options for a workflow.

forTask.title: ForTask
forTask.description: Allows workflows to iterate over a collection of items, executing a defined set of subtasks for each item in the collection. This task type is instrumental in handling scenarios such as batch processing, data transformation, and repetitive operations across datasets.

at.title: ForAt
at.description: The name of the variable used to store the index of the current item being enumerated.

each.title: ForEach
each.description: The name of the variable used to store the current item being enumerated.

in.title: ForIn
in.description: A runtime expression used to get the collection to enumerate.

for.title: ForTaskConfiguration
for.description: The definition of the loop that iterates over a range of values.

while.title: While
while.description: A runtime expression that represents the condition, if any, that must be met for the iteration to continue.

forkTask.title: ForkTask
forkTask.description: Allows workflows to execute multiple tasks concurrently and optionally race them against each other, with a single possible winner, which sets the task's output.

compete.title: ForkCompete
compete.description: Indicates whether or not the concurrent tasks are racing against each other, with a single possible winner, which sets the composite task's output.

fork.title: ForkTaskConfiguration
fork.description: The configuration of the branches to perform concurrently.

schema.title: InputSchema
schema.description: The schema used to describe and validate the input of the workflow or task.

input.title: Input
input.description: Configures the input of a workflow or task.

listenTask.title: ListenTask
listenTask.description: Provides a mechanism for workflows to await and react to external events, enabling event-driven behaviour within workflow systems.

read.title: ListenAndReadAs
read.description: Specifies how events are read during the listen operation.

to.title: ListenTo
to.description: Defines the event(s) to listen to.

listen.title: ListenTaskConfiguration
listen.description: The configuration of the listener to use.

as.title: OutputAs
as.description: A runtime expression, if any, used to mutate and/or filter the output of the workflow or task.

schema.title: OutputSchema
schema.description: The schema used to describe and validate the output of the workflow or task.

output.title: Output
output.description: Configures the output of a workflow or task.

oneOf.title: RaiseErrorDefinition
oneOf.description: Defines the error to raise.

oneOf.title: RaiseErrorReference
oneOf.description: The name of the error to raise

raise.title: RaiseTaskConfiguration
raise.description: The definition of the error to raise.

runTask.title: RunTask
runTask.description: Provides the capability to execute external containers, shell commands, scripts, or workflows.

await.title: AwaitProcessCompletion
await.description: Whether to await the process completion before continuing.

run.title: RunTaskConfiguration
run.description: The configuration of the process to execute.

arguments.title: ContainerArguments
arguments.description: A list of the arguments, if any, passed as argv to the command or default container CMD

command.title: ContainerCommand
command.description: The command, if any, to execute on the container.

environment.title: ContainerEnvironment
environment.description: A key/value mapping of the environment variables, if any, to use when running the configured process.

image.title: ContainerImage
image.description: The name of the container image to run.

lifetime.title: ContainerLifetime
lifetime.description: An object, if any, used to configure the container's lifetime

name.title: ContainerName
name.description: A runtime expression, if any, used to give specific name to the container.

volumes.title: ContainerVolumes
volumes.description: The container's volume mappings, if any.

container.title: Container
container.description: The configuration of the container to run.

oneOf.title: RunContainer
oneOf.description: Enables the execution of external processes encapsulated within a containerized environment.

arguments.title: ScriptArguments
arguments.description: A list of the arguments, if any, to the script as argv

environment.title: ScriptEnvironment
environment.description: A key/value mapping of the environment variables, if any, to use when running the configured script process.

language.title: ScriptLanguage
language.description: The language of the script to run.

script.title: Script
script.description: The configuration of the script to run.

oneOf.title: InlineScript
oneOf.description: The script's code.

oneOf.title: ExternalScript
oneOf.description: The script's resource.

oneOf.title: RunScript
oneOf.description: Enables the execution of custom scripts or code within a workflow, empowering workflows to perform specialised logic, data processing, or integration tasks by executing user-defined scripts written in various programming languages.

arguments.title: ShellArguments
arguments.description: A list of the arguments, if any, to the shell command as argv

environment.title: ShellEnvironment
environment.description: A key/value mapping of the environment variables, if any, to use when running the configured process.

shell.title: Shell
shell.description: The configuration of the shell command to run.

oneOf.title: RunShell
oneOf.description: Enables the execution of shell commands within a workflow, enabling workflows to interact with the underlying operating system and perform system-level operations, such as file manipulation, environment configuration, or system administration tasks.

input.title: SubflowInput
input.description: The data, if any, to pass as input to the workflow to execute. The value should be validated against the target workflow's input schema, if specified.

workflow.title: SubflowConfiguration
workflow.description: The configuration of the workflow to run.

oneOf.title: RunWorkflow
oneOf.description: Enables the invocation and execution of nested workflows within a parent workflow, facilitating modularization, reusability, and abstraction of complex logic or business processes by encapsulating them into standalone workflow units.

format.title: SchemaFormat
format.description: The schema's format. Defaults to 'json'. The (optional) version of the format can be set using `{format}:{version}`.

schema.title: Schema
schema.description: Represents the definition of a schema.

setTask.title: SetTask
setTask.description: A task used to set data.

at.title: SubscriptionIteratorIndex
at.description: The name of the variable used to store the index of the current item being enumerated.

do.title: SubscriptionIteratorTasks
do.description: The tasks to perform for each consumed item.

export.title: SubscriptionIteratorExport
export.description: An object, if any, used to customise the content of the workflow context.

item.title: SubscriptionIteratorItem
item.description: The name of the variable used to store the current item being enumerated.

output.title: SubscriptionIteratorOutput
output.description: An object, if any, used to customise the item's output and to document its schema.

subscriptionIterator.title: SubscriptionIterator
subscriptionIterator.description: Configures the iteration over each item (event or message) consumed by a subscription.

switchTask.title: SwitchTask
switchTask.description: Enables conditional branching within workflows, allowing them to dynamically select different paths based on specified conditions or criteria.

then.title: SwitchCaseOutcome
then.description: The flow directive to execute when the case matches.

when.title: SwitchCaseCondition
when.description: A runtime expression used to determine whether or not the case matches.

additionalProperties.title: SwitchCase
additionalProperties.description: The definition of a case within a switch task, defining a condition and corresponding tasks to execute if the condition is met.

switch.title: SwitchTaskConfiguration
switch.description: The definition of the switch to use.

task.title: Task
task.description: A discrete unit of work that contributes to achieving the overall objectives defined by the workflow.

if.title: TaskBaseIf
if.description: A runtime expression, if any, used to determine whether or not the task should be run.

metadata.title: TaskBaseMetadata
metadata.description: Holds additional information about the task.

then.title: TaskBaseThen
then.description: The flow directive to be performed upon completion of the task.

taskBase.title: TaskBase
taskBase.description: An object inherited by all tasks.

taskList.title: TaskList
taskList.description: List of named tasks to perform.

__zigflow_id.title: ZigflowID
__zigflow_id.description: A system-generated unique identifier for the task. This value is assigned automatically and should not be modified by users.

heartbeat.title: Heartbeat
heartbeat.description: Heartbeats will be triggered after this time period.

after.title: TimeoutAfter
after.description: The duration after which to timeout.

tryTask.title: TryTask
tryTask.description: Serves as a mechanism within workflows to handle errors gracefully, potentially retrying failed tasks before proceeding with alternate ones.

do.title: TryTaskCatchDo
do.description: The definition of the task(s) to run when catching an error.

catch.title: TryTaskCatch
catch.description: The object used to define the errors to catch.

waitTask.title: WaitTask
waitTask.description: Allows workflows to pause or delay their execution for a specified period of time.

wait.title: WaitTaskConfiguration
wait.description: The amount of time to wait.

title: Zigflow
description: JSON Schema for a Zigflow workflow definition.
